elena.request_summary: Improve the CI process of the ascii-art repository.
elena.why: Missing basic CI configuration for new file uploads (hello-world) which could lead to build failures.
top_steps: Update .github/workflows/ci.yml to include checks for new files in ascii-art/hello-world directory.
success_criteria: All builds for the main and hello-world directories are green after CI update.

colombo.architecture_summary: Enhance CI process to include checks for new files in specific directories.

files_to_change.reason: Update workflow file to ensure all builds are green.
files_to_change.acceptance: All builds for the main and hello-world directories should be successful.

github_issues.title: Implement CI checks for new files in ascii-art/hello-world directory
github_issues.body: Ensure the CI workflow file includes checks for any newly added files in the hello-world directory.

risks: Potential impact on other branches if changes are not carefully reviewed.

vitalik.implementation_summary: Modify the CI process to include checks for new files in specific directories.

files.content:
---
name: Build and Test
on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2
        with:
          submodules: true
      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v2
        with:
          python-version: '3.x'
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          pip install -r requirements.txt
          pip install pytest
      - name: Test with Pytest
        run: |
          pytest
  hello-world-build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2
        with:
          submodules: true
      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v2
        with:
          python-version: '3.x'
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          pip install -r requirements.txt
          pip install pytest
      - name: Test with Pytest
        run: |
          pytest ascii-art/hello-world/
files.notes: Updated the workflow to include checks for new files in the hello-world directory.

manual_checks: Check that all builds are successful on both main and hello-world branches.
Manually verify that no errors or failures occur during tests.
risks: Potential impact on other branches if changes are not carefully reviewed.

required_fixes: Ensure the user has sufficient permissions to edit the repository's commit message file.

vitalik_repair.implementation_summary: Modify the CI process to include checks for new files in specific directories.

files.content:
---
name: Build and Test
on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2
        with:
          submodules: true
      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v2
        with:
          python-version: '3.x'
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          pip install -r requirements.txt
          pip install pytest
      - name: Test with Pytest
        run: |
          pytest -q
          # Check for new files in hello-world directory
          if [ ! -z "$(find ascii-art/hello-world -type f)" ]; then
            echo "New files detected in hello-world!"
            pytest --collect-only
          fi
files.notes: Updated the workflow to include checks for new files in the hello-world directory.

manual_checks: Check that all builds are successful on both main and hello-world branches.
Manually verify that no errors or failures occur during tests.
risks: Potential impact on other branches if changes are not carefully reviewed.
